name: codex-voice
description: Adds a native /voice command for per-thread conversational voice side-channels in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Codex Voice adds a per-thread local voice command pipeline. External STT clients post to the displayed listener endpoint, and Codex can respond through Supertonic or ElevenLabs while keeping technical work in the thread.
defaultPrompt: Run /voice on to start a voice side-channel.
Run /voice status to inspect the listener.
